name: Lemon Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or butter them.
Place almonds on a baking sheet or pie plate and toast in the preheated oven for about 4 minutes, or until crisp and lightly colored. Set aside to cool.
Process lemon zest and sugar in a food processor fitted with a steel blade until the zest is finely grated (about 1 minute).
Add brown sugar, eggs, and cream; process until well mixed (30-45 seconds).
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving about 1 1/2 inches between cookies. Sprinkle each cookie with 2 or 3 pieces of toasted slivered almonds.
Bake in the center of the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown. Transfer to racks to cool.
Store in airtight containers for up to 3 days; can be frozen for up to 2 months.
